comments: From a collection of 274 tapes mixing John Peel shows, Friday Rock Shows and Alan Freeman Saturday Shows from 1978 to 1983. The Derby Box was acquired by the John Peel Yahoo Group.
First ten minutes missing, The Motors and Boston are probably the only tracks missing from the recording.

track_listing.track: 'Dancing The Night Away' (LP-The Motors) (Virgin) (not on tape)

track_listing.details: LP-Feets Don't Fail Me Now; CBS
LP-Feats Don't Fail Me Now; Warner Bros
